title: AI Agent Product Engineering - Public Domain Map
sanitization: High-level public summary only. No private code, paths, endpoints, secrets, customer data, or file-level graph.

domains.name: Research Platform
domains.summary: Study design, recruitment, interview workflow, reporting, and workspace-level product state.

domains.name: Agent Interface
domains.summary: MCP, CLI, skill, and plugin surfaces that convert natural-language intent into stable product operations.

domains.name: Voice Runtime
domains.summary: Real-time interview sessions, media flow, room state, interruptions, and replayable evidence.

domains.name: Report Quality
domains.summary: Artifact generation, fact locking, edit flows, benchmark feedback, and regression checks.

domains.name: Participant Supply
domains.summary: Recruitment, sample capacity, incentives, and participant workflow coordination.

domains.name: Growth and Onboarding
domains.summary: Public website, product entry, auth bridge, and conversion paths into the SaaS platform.

domains.name: Infrastructure and Release
domains.summary: E2E validation, preview gates, environment isolation, gateway boundaries, and release confidence.
